description: After breaking out on Top Gear, the Londoners decided to push the limits of the GTA's engine furhter. The GTA AM (short for Autodelta Maggiorata) now has a custom Rotrex supercharger added on top of the bored engine as well as many all-around powertrain upgrades. This gives a boosted horsepower figure of 400hp, which rightfully sounds scary.
creator: Keanny
